raw_consumer_statement: I disputed a charge due to my flight being cancelled. I had in writing that I submitted to Citi that I would be refunded the full amount due to my flight being canceled. I was only refunded {$19.00} per ticket ( XXXX tickets ). The tickets were {$980.00} each. I asked the XXXX agent repeatedly that I would be refunded the full amount and he said yes. The reason I was adamant about this was because we were going to have to rent a car to get home. After only being refunded {$19.00} per ticket, I submitted a dispute with evidence to Citi. This should have been an easy dispute in favor of me due to the written communication I had with XXXX. They sided with XXXX and closed the dispute. I have no idea how this is even possible.
